offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try Email notifications and Manual invoice entry on 1-3 items
pay: Subscription: $19/month for basic features, $29/month for premium features
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing vendor data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
